results.title: Asthma Management Guidelines
results.snippet: Inhaled corticosteroids are the cornerstone of long-term asthma control. Short-acting beta-agonists (SABAs) are used as reliever therapy for acute symptoms.

results.title: Stepwise Approach to Asthma Treatment
results.snippet: Therapy is stepped up or down based on control: low-dose ICS, then ICS plus a long-acting beta-agonist (LABA), with biologics reserved for severe disease.
